top_entities.name: Figure AI
top_entities.news_summary: MAJOR (ongoing): Figure AI safety whistleblower lawsuit — former head of product safety Robert Gruendel filed federal suit (Northern District CA) alleging wrongful termination after warning robots could fracture human skulls. Malfunction incident: robot carved quarter-inch gash into steel refrigerator door. Safety plan allegedly gutted after $39B valuation round. Company denied wrongdoing, cites poor performance.

top_entities.name: Nigeria
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 19 2026): Borno State — 15,000 people at IPC Phase 5 (Catastrophe) during June-August lean season. Nigeria added to highest-concern FAO-WFP hunger hotspot list. Part of 52.8M at acute food insecurity across West Africa and Sahel lean season peak.

top_entities.name: Ukraine
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 18-19 2026): Russia struck Dnipro Jun 18 (11 wounded, rising). Air defense shot down 79 drones since evening Jun 18. Ukrainian drones struck Moscow refinery Jun 18 in retaliatory raid. Russia's own internal reports (intercepted by SBU) confirmed Ukraine did NOT strike Bryansk bus — refuting Russian/Belarusian false-flag claims. UN mission: June 2026 highest civilian fatality month in 3 years.

top_entities.name: xAI/Grok
top_entities.news_summary: MAJOR (Jun 10-11 2026): Former xAI engineer Devin Kim (now head of Center for AI Safety) filed whistleblower retaliation suit against xAI and SpaceX. Allegations: terminated after warning Grok safety guardrails inadequate — risks include discrimination, bombmaking, bioterrorism facilitation. Filed Superior Court California Jun 8. Timed days before SpaceX IPO (Jun 11-12). Bloomberg/TechCrunch coverage.

top_entities.name: Humana
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 2026): Humana prior authorization denial rate for long-term acute care hospitals 72%+ (54% increase 2020-2022). Senate PSI and HHS-OIG findings published June 2026. Training sessions documented teaching staff to justify denials when speaking to providers. Jun 12 federal regulatory action on major insurer denial patterns. BOUNDARY WATCH: composite 40.6, 0.6 pts above Developing/Functional band boundary.

top_entities.name: Bolivia
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 2026 — week 7+): 10 dead, 37 injured, 365 arrested since May 1. 103 active road blockades (7 departments). Emergency powers legislation signed Jun 8 by President Paz. Army authorized but not deployed. Cochabamba new epicenter (32 cut routes). Food, fuel, medicine, ambulance access blocked. $1.6B economic losses. US labeled movement narco-terrorist.

top_entities.name: Israel
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 19 2026): Gaza — 82.6% within militarized zone or under displacement orders. 684,000+ displaced since March 2025 ceasefire breakdown. 1,103 Palestinians killed in West Bank Oct 2023-Jun 5 2026 (241 children). UNRWA still blocked from direct aid since March 2025. Systematic destruction of civilian infrastructure ongoing. 4,000+ cancer patients at risk.

top_entities.name: Burkina Faso
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 19 2026): Lean season peak — part of 52.8M at acute food insecurity across Sahel. Government/allied forces documented killing more than twice as many civilians as Islamist militants since 2023. Likely war crimes and crimes against humanity. Sahel appeal 28% funded.

top_entities.name: Mali
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 19 2026): Sahel lean season peak Jun-Aug 2026 — 52.8M at acute food insecurity. Mali government forces and Russian Africa Corps documented killing 3-4x more civilians than jihadists — possible war crimes including summary executions, indiscriminate airstrikes, rape. 2026 Mali offensives ongoing. Sahel appeal 28% funded; WFP may halt assistance July without $131M.

top_entities.name: Democratic Republic of C
top_entities.news_summary: ESCALATING CRITICAL (Jun 19 2026): DRC Ebola (Bundibugyo) — 837 confirmed cases, 196 deaths, 376 hospitalized as of Jun 15. 29 new cases and 4 new deaths since Jun 16 update. Ituri 767 cases (20 health zones), North Kivu 67 cases, South Kivu 3 cases. No approved vaccine or treatment; WHO: vaccine 9 months away. Africa CDC head warns could exceed 2014 West Africa outbreak (11,000 deaths). Hostage crisis: burial team members held in Mongbwalu.

top_entities.name: Iran
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 19 2026): NCRI Jun 19 brief published. 784+ executions YTD — pace unmatched in decades. 126th consecutive Tuesday prison hunger strikes across 56 facilities. Jun 20: Paris diaspora rally (thousands, People's Mojahedin) calling for international response. 78 protesters/political prisoners at imminent execution risk per Amnesty. Three men executed for Dec 2025/Jan 2026 protest participation.

top_entities.name: Russia
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING (Jun 18-19 2026): Russia continued bombardment of Ukraine. Dnipro struck (11 wounded). Air defense intercepted 79 Russian drones overnight Jun 18-19. Moscow refinery hit by Ukrainian drones Jun 18 (retaliatory). Russia internal documents debunked Bryansk false-flag (per Ukrainian SBU). UN: June 2026 remains highest civilian fatality month since war began.

top_entities.name: Sudan
top_entities.news_summary: ESCALATING (Jun 18 2026): Western nations warned UN Human Rights Council Jun 18 of imminent RSF assault on al-Obeid — 500,000 civilians at risk. 10 consecutive days of drone strikes killed 50+ civilians across al-Obeid and North Kordofan. RSF previously attacked Zamzam (300-1,500 killed). 8.6M internally displaced, 4M fled as refugees. ICC prosecutor Jun 2026: atrocities "repeated town by town."

top_entities.name: Apple
top_entities.news_summary: CRITICAL DATE (Jun 20 2026): Towson Town Center unionized Apple Store closes TODAY. IAM NLRB unfair labor practice charge active — Apple allegedly denying unionized workers same transfer rights as non-union store closures (Trumbull CT, North County CA stores got transfers). 54 Congressional Labor Caucus members demanded NLRB investigation. Maryland Governor publicly criticized Apple. First-ever unionized US Apple Store, 78 employees.

top_entities.name: OpenAI
top_entities.news_summary: MAJOR (Jun 12-14 2026): 42-state attorney general coalition opened formal investigation into OpenAI; NY AG Letitia James served subpoena Jun 12. Covers advertising, user engagement, model sycophancy, consumer/health data handling, treatment of minors/seniors. OpenAI filed confidential S-1 with SEC Jun 8 (near-$1T IPO valuation). 42-state subpoena arrived 4 days after S-1. Also Jun 5: co-signed biosecurity letter to Congress with Anthropic/Google/Microsoft.

Also Jun 5: co-signed biosecurity letter to Congress with Anthropic/Google/Microsoft.
